headline: Wabtec Has A Head Of Steam Building For 2026 And 2027

summary: Wabtec (NYSE:WAB) reported first-quarter 2026 results that management said came in ahead of internal expectations operationally, while earnings also benefited from non-operational tailwinds tied to currency and tax timing.
